001package guiUserUpdate;
002
003import entityClasses.User;
004import javafx.stage.Stage;
005
006public class ControllerUserUpdate {
007        /*-********************************************************************************************
008
009        The Controller for ViewUserUpdate 
010        
011        **********************************************************************************************/
012
013        /**********
014         * <p> Title: ControllerUserUpdate Class</p>
015         * 
016         * <p> Description: This static class supports the actions initiated by the ViewUserUpdate
017         * class. In this case, there is just one method, no constructors, and no attributes.</p>
018         *
019         */
020
021        /*-********************************************************************************************
022
023        The User Interface Actions for this page
024        
025        **********************************************************************************************/
026
027        
028        /**********
029         * <p> Method: public goToUserHomePage(Stage theStage, User theUser) </p>
030         * 
031         * <p> Description: This method is called when the user has clicked on the button to
032         * proceed to the user's home page.
033         * 
034         * @param theStage specifies the JavaFX Stage for next next GUI page and it's methods
035         * 
036         * @param theUser specifies the user so we go to the right page and so the right information
037         */
038        protected static void goToUserHomePage(Stage theStage, User theUser) {
039                
040                // Get the roles the user selected during login
041                int theRole = applicationMain.FoundationsMain.activeHomePage;
042
043                // Use that role to proceed to that role's home page
044                switch (theRole) {
045                case 1:
046                        guiAdminHome.ViewAdminHome.displayAdminHome(theStage, theUser);
047                        break;
048                case 2:
049                        guiStudentHome.ViewStudentHome.displayStudentHome(theStage, theUser);
050                        break;
051                case 3:
052                        guiStaffHome.ViewStaffHome.displayStaffHome(theStage, theUser);
053                        break;
054                default: 
055                        System.out.println("*** ERROR *** UserUpdate goToUserHome has an invalid role: " + 
056                                        theRole);
057                        System.exit(0);
058                }
059        }
060}
